description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The front facade includes large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the upper floor, while the ground floor has a main entry door and a smaller window. A carport with a partial privacy wall is attached to one side, providing covered parking for a single vehicle. The property is landscaped with a few medium-sized trees, adding greenery and shade to the surroundings. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a functional layout typical of contemporary urban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white exterior, large windows, and an attached carport, surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large upper windows, carport with a car, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled upper story, a single window, and a tree close to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, carport, and more visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, wood and white wall contrast, and trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flush to the facade, and a covered carport adjacent to the entry
